stories.title: **Munetaka Murakami Sets Japanese-Born HR Record with 4 HRs in First 8 Games**

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Munetaka Murakami just broke Shohei Ohtani's record.

4 home runs in his first 8 MLB games — the most ever by a Japanese-born player, passing Ohtani's 3 in 2018.

The NPB champion is making quite an entrance. #WhiteSox

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Murakami. 4 HRs. 8 games.

The White Sox' Japanese import has broken Ohtani's record for the most home runs by a Japanese-born player in their first 8 MLB games.

Three-time NPB batting champion. Now MLB record holder. #WhiteSox #MLB

article.headline: Murakami Sets Japanese-Born HR Record With 4 HRs in First 8 MLB Games

stories.title: **Braves Complete Sweep of Diamondbacks — Win Third Straight After Dominant Week**

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Atlanta swept the Diamondbacks.

After a 17-2 blowout in Game 2, the Braves closed it out 6-4 on Sunday. 3-0 series win to open the home stand.

The NL is on notice. #BravosCountry #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The Braves: 17-2 one day, sweep the next.

Atlanta is off to a statement start. The defending NL East contenders look like they're back and better than last year. #BravosCountry

article.headline: Braves Sweep Diamondbacks, Cap Dominant Home Opening Series

stories.title: **Chase DeLauter: 4 HRs in First 3 Games — Only 2nd Player in MLB History**

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Only Trevor Story in 2016 had done it before.

Chase DeLauter hit 4 home runs in his first 3 MLB games — off three different All-Stars.

The Guardians rookie is putting the AL on notice. #ForTheLand #MLB

article.headline: Chase DeLauter Joins Trevor Story as Only Players to Hit 4 HRs in First 3 MLB Games

stories.title: **Jacob Misiorowski Sets Brewers Opening Day K Record — 11 Ks, Youngest Since King Felix**

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Jacob Misiorowski. 11 strikeouts. 5 innings. Opening Day.

That's a new Brewers franchise record. And the youngest pitcher with 10+ Ks on Opening Day since Felix Hernandez in 2007 (who was just 20 years old).

Milwaukee's rotation looks dangerous. #MilwaukeeBrewers #MLB

article.headline: Misiorowski Strikes Out 11, Sets Brewers Opening Day Record — Youngest to Do It Since King Felix

stories.title: **Paul Skenes' Shortest Career Start — 2/3 IP, 5 ER on Opening Day**

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Paul Skenes lasted 2 outs in his Opening Day start.

5 runs. 37 pitches. 2/3 inning. The NL Cy Young runner-up was chased by the Mets before the first inning was even over.

Worst career start for the reigning Pirates ace. #LetsGoBucs #Mets

article.headline: Paul Skenes Lasts 2/3 of an Inning in Opening Day Disaster Against the Mets

stories.title: **Yankees Top Marlins 7-5 — New York Asserts AL East Lead in Week 1**

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Yankees: 6-1 after Opening Week.

New York beat Miami 7-5 on Sunday to take the series and extend their AL East lead. Max Fried is pitching like an ace.

The Bronx is back. #RepBX #MLB

stories.title: **Opening Week Wrap-Up — Biggest Surprises After 7 Games**

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Opening Week is done.

Records broken: Murakami (Japanese HR record), DeLauter (4 HRs in 3 games), Misiorowski (Brewers OD K record).

Surprises: Marlins 5-1. Skenes chased in 2/3 IP. The 2026 season is already wild. #MLB
